surface_verification.justification: Backend triage-producer gating + a CI-workflow trigger line; no UI surface. Producer behavior verified by the full shared unit suite (3627 passed); the push:[main] trigger's effect (main scanned on merge, artifact tracks HEAD) is only observable in live GitHub Actions.

behaviors.behavior: prompt-injection source is evaluated/emits when GitHub Code Scanning is available (cs_alerts non-None) — defect A regression
a clean prompt scan ([] findings) opens auto-resolve for gh-prompt even when Code Scanning is available
prompt_risks.json is fetched on every run while the SAST findings.json stays gated on cs_alerts is None (double-count guard preserved)
existing prompt-source behavior preserved when Code Scanning unavailable (emit / clean-resolve / fetch-failed-None)
security.yml scans main on every push so the scan artifact tracks HEAD (staleness fix B)
behaviors.reason: the effect (main re-scanned on merge, artifact refreshed to HEAD) only manifests when GitHub Actions runs the workflow; the declarative trigger was verified manually (YAML parse: push.branches=[main]; push routes to --full; SARIF/critical-gate/artifact-upload steps are push-safe).
